title: Short-wave infrared fluorescence imaging of near-infrared dyes with robust end-tail emission using a small-animal imaging device.
author: Arena F La Cava F Faletto D Roberto M Crivellin F Stummo F Adamo A Boccalon M Napolitano R Blasi F Koch M Taruttis A Reitano E
content: S-EPMC10422693 PMC10422693 Short-wave infrared fluorescence imaging of near-infrared dyes with robust end-tail emission using a small-animal imaging device. Commercially available near-infrared (NIR) dyes, including indocyanine green (ICG), display an end-tail of the fluorescence emission spectrum
